title: Color Contrast
description: Minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text (large text 3:1); Material Design

title: Focus States
description: Visible focus rings on interactive elements (2–4px; Apple HIG, MD)

title: Alt Text
description: Descriptive alt text for meaningful images

title: Aria Labels
description: aria-label for icon-only buttons; accessibilityLabel in native (Apple HIG)

title: Keyboard Nav
description: Tab order matches visual order; full keyboard support (Apple HIG)

title: Skip Links
description: Skip to main content for keyboard users

title: Color Not Only
description: Don't convey info by color alone (add icon/text)

title: Dynamic Type
description: Support system text scaling; avoid truncation as text grows (Apple Dynamic Type, MD)

title: Reduced Motion
description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion; reduce/disable animations when requested (Apple Reduced Motion API, MD)

title: Voiceover Sr
description: Meaningful accessibilityLabel/accessibilityHint; logical reading order for VoiceOver/screen readers (Apple HIG, MD)

title: Escape Routes
description: Provide cancel/back in modals and multi-step flows (Apple HIG)

title: Keyboard Shortcuts
description: Preserve system and a11y shortcuts; offer keyboard alternatives for drag-and-drop (Apple HIG)

title: Touch Target Size
description: Min 44×44pt (Apple) / 48×48dp (Material); extend hit area beyond visual bounds if needed

title: Touch Spacing
description: Minimum 8px/8dp gap between touch targets (Apple HIG, MD)

title: Hover Vs Tap
description: Use click/tap for primary interactions; don't rely on hover alone

title: Loading Buttons
description: Disable button during async operations; show spinner or progress

title: Gesture Conflicts
description: Avoid horizontal swipe on main content; prefer vertical scroll

title: Tap Delay
description: Use touch-action: manipulation to reduce 300ms delay (Web)

title: Standard Gestures
description: Use platform standard gestures consistently; don't redefine (e.g. swipe-back, pinch-zoom) (Apple HIG)

title: System Gestures
description: Don't block system gestures (Control Center, back swipe, etc.) (Apple HIG)

title: Press Feedback
description: Visual feedback on press (ripple/highlight; MD state layers)

title: Haptic Feedback
description: Use haptic for confirmations and important actions; avoid overuse (Apple HIG)

title: Gesture Alternative
description: Don't rely on gesture-only interactions; always provide visible controls for critical actions

title: Safe Area Awareness
description: Keep primary touch targets away from notch, Dynamic Island, gesture bar and screen edges

title: No Precision Required
description: Avoid requiring pixel-perfect taps on small icons or thin edges

title: Swipe Clarity
description: Swipe actions must show clear affordance or hint (chevron, label, tutorial)

title: Drag Threshold
description: Use a movement threshold before starting drag to avoid accidental drags

title: Image Optimization
description: Use WebP/AVIF, responsive images (srcset/sizes), lazy load non-critical assets

title: Image Dimension
description: Declare width/height or use aspect-ratio to prevent layout shift (Core Web Vitals: CLS)

title: Font Loading
description: Use font-display: swap/optional to avoid invisible text (FOIT); reserve space to reduce layout shift (MD)

title: Font Preload
description: Preload only critical fonts; avoid overusing preload on every variant

title: Critical Css
description: Prioritize above-the-fold CSS (inline critical CSS or early-loaded stylesheet)

title: Lazy Loading
description: Lazy load non-hero components via dynamic import / route-level splitting

title: Bundle Splitting
description: Split code by route/feature (React Suspense / Next.js dynamic) to reduce initial load and TTI

title: Third Party Scripts
description: Load third-party scripts async/defer; audit and remove unnecessary ones (MD)

title: Reduce Reflows
description: Avoid frequent layout reads/writes; batch DOM reads then writes

title: Content Jumping
description: Reserve space for async content to avoid layout jumps (Core Web Vitals: CLS)

title: Lazy Load Below Fold
description: Use loading="lazy" for below-the-fold images and heavy media

title: Virtualize Lists
description: Virtualize lists with 50+ items to improve memory efficiency and scroll performance

title: Main Thread Budget
description: Keep per-frame work under ~16ms for 60fps; move heavy tasks off main thread (HIG, MD)

title: Progressive Loading
description: Use skeleton screens / shimmer instead of long blocking spinners for >1s operations (Apple HIG)

title: Input Latency
description: Keep input latency under ~100ms for taps/scrolls (Material responsiveness standard)

title: Tap Feedback Speed
description: Provide visual feedback within 100ms of tap (Apple HIG)

title: Debounce Throttle
description: Use debounce/throttle for high-frequency events (scroll, resize, input)

title: Offline Support
description: Provide offline state messaging and basic fallback (PWA / mobile)

title: Network Fallback
description: Offer degraded modes for slow networks (lower-res images, fewer animations)

title: Style Match
description: Match style to product type (use `--design-system` for recommendations)

title: Consistency
description: Use same style across all pages

title: No Emoji Icons
description: Use SVG icons (Heroicons, Lucide), not emojis

title: Effects Match Style
description: Shadows, blur, radius aligned with chosen style (glass / flat / clay etc.)

title: Platform Adaptive
description: Respect platform idioms (iOS HIG vs Material): navigation, controls, typography, motion

title: State Clarity
description: Make hover/pressed/disabled states visually distinct while staying on-style (Material state layers)

title: Elevation Consistent
description: Use a consistent elevation/shadow scale for cards, sheets, modals; avoid random shadow values

title: Dark Mode Pairing
description: Design light/dark variants together to keep brand, contrast, and style consistent

title: Icon Style Consistent
description: Use one icon set/visual language (stroke width, corner radius) across the product

title: System Controls
description: Prefer native/system controls over fully custom ones; only customize when branding requires it (Apple HIG)

title: Blur Purpose
description: Use blur to indicate background dismissal (modals, sheets), not as decoration (Apple HIG)

title: Primary Action
description: Each screen should have only one primary CTA; secondary actions visually subordinate (Apple HIG)

title: Mobile First
description: Design mobile-first, then scale up to tablet and desktop

title: Readable Font Size
description: Minimum 16px body text on mobile (avoids iOS auto-zoom)

title: Line Length Control
description: Mobile 35–60 chars per line; desktop 60–75 chars

title: Horizontal Scroll
description: No horizontal scroll on mobile; ensure content fits viewport width

title: Touch Density
description: Keep component spacing comfortable for touch: not cramped, not causing mis-taps

title: Fixed Element Offset
description: Fixed navbar/bottom bar must reserve safe padding for underlying content

title: Scroll Behavior
description: Avoid nested scroll regions that interfere with the main scroll experience

title: Orientation Support
description: Keep layout readable and operable in landscape mode

title: Content Priority
description: Show core content first on mobile; fold or hide secondary content

title: Visual Hierarchy
description: Establish hierarchy via size, spacing, contrast — not color alone

title: Contrast Readability
description: Darker text on light backgrounds (e.g. slate-900 on white)

title: Text Styles System
description: Use platform type system: iOS 11 Dynamic Type styles / Material 5 type roles (display, headline, title, body, label) (HIG, MD)

title: Weight Hierarchy
description: Use font-weight to reinforce hierarchy: Bold headings (600–700), Regular body (400), Medium labels (500) (MD)

title: Color Semantic
description: Define semantic color tokens (primary, secondary, error, surface, on-surface) not raw hex in components (Material color system)

title: Color Dark Mode
description: Dark mode uses desaturated / lighter tonal variants, not inverted colors; test contrast separately (HIG, MD)

title: Color Accessible Pairs
description: Foreground/background pairs must meet 4.5:1 (AA) or 7:1 (AAA); use tools to verify (WCAG, MD)

title: Color Not Decorative Only
description: Functional color (error red, success green) must include icon/text; avoid color-only meaning (HIG, MD)

title: Truncation Strategy
description: Prefer wrapping over truncation; when truncating use ellipsis and provide full text via tooltip/expand (Apple HIG)

title: Letter Spacing
description: Respect default letter-spacing per platform; avoid tight tracking on body text (HIG, MD)

title: Number Tabular
description: Use tabular/monospaced figures for data columns, prices, and timers to prevent layout shift

title: Whitespace Balance
description: Use whitespace intentionally to group related items and separate sections; avoid visual clutter (Apple HIG)

title: Duration Timing
description: Use 150–300ms for micro-interactions; complex transitions ≤400ms; avoid >500ms (MD)

title: Transform Performance
description: Use transform/opacity only; avoid animating width/height/top/left

title: Loading States
description: Show skeleton or progress indicator when loading exceeds 300ms

title: Excessive Motion
description: Animate 1-2 key elements per view max

title: Easing
description: Use ease-out for entering, ease-in for exiting; avoid linear for UI transitions

title: Motion Meaning
description: Every animation must express a cause-effect relationship, not just be decorative (Apple HIG)

title: State Transition
description: State changes (hover / active / expanded / collapsed / modal) should animate smoothly, not snap

title: Continuity
description: Page/screen transitions should maintain spatial continuity (shared element, directional slide) (Apple HIG)

title: Parallax Subtle
description: Use parallax sparingly; must respect reduced-motion and not cause disorientation (Apple HIG)

title: Spring Physics
description: Prefer spring/physics-based curves over linear or cubic-bezier for natural feel (Apple HIG fluid animations)

title: Exit Faster Than Enter
description: Exit animations shorter than enter (~60–70% of enter duration) to feel responsive (MD motion)

title: Stagger Sequence
description: Stagger list/grid item entrance by 30–50ms per item; avoid all-at-once or too-slow reveals (MD)

title: Shared Element Transition
description: Use shared element / hero transitions for visual continuity between screens (MD, HIG)

title: Interruptible
description: Animations must be interruptible; user tap/gesture cancels in-progress animation immediately (Apple HIG)

title: No Blocking Animation
description: Never block user input during an animation; UI must stay interactive (Apple HIG)

title: Fade Crossfade
description: Use crossfade for content replacement within the same container (MD)

title: Scale Feedback
description: Subtle scale (0.95–1.05) on press for tappable cards/buttons; restore on release (HIG, MD)

title: Gesture Feedback
description: Drag, swipe, and pinch must provide real-time visual response tracking the finger (MD Motion)

title: Hierarchy Motion
description: Use translate/scale direction to express hierarchy: enter from below = deeper, exit upward = back (MD)

title: Motion Consistency
description: Unify duration/easing tokens globally; all animations share the same rhythm and feel

title: Opacity Threshold
description: Fading elements should not linger below opacity 0.2; either fade fully or remain visible

title: Modal Motion
description: Modals/sheets should animate from their trigger source (scale+fade or slide-in) for spatial context (HIG, MD)

title: Navigation Direction
description: Forward navigation animates left/up; backward animates right/down — keep direction logically consistent (HIG)

title: Layout Shift Avoid
description: Animations must not cause layout reflow or CLS; use transform for position changes

title: Error Placement
description: Show error below the related field

title: Submit Feedback
description: Loading then success/error state on submit

title: Empty States
description: Helpful message and action when no content

title: Input Helper Text
description: Provide persistent helper text below complex inputs, not just placeholder (Material Design)

title: Disabled States
description: Disabled elements use reduced opacity (0.38–0.5) + cursor change + semantic attribute (MD)

title: Progressive Disclosure
description: Reveal complex options progressively; don't overwhelm users upfront (Apple HIG)

title: Inline Validation
description: Validate on blur (not keystroke); show error only after user finishes input (MD)

title: Input Type Keyboard
description: Use semantic input types (email, tel, number) to trigger the correct mobile keyboard (HIG, MD)

title: Password Toggle
description: Provide show/hide toggle for password fields (MD)

title: Autofill Support
description: Use autocomplete / textContentType attributes so the system can autofill (HIG, MD)

title: Undo Support
description: Allow undo for destructive or bulk actions (e.g. "Undo delete" toast) (Apple HIG)

title: Success Feedback
description: Confirm completed actions with brief visual feedback (checkmark, toast, color flash) (MD)

title: Error Recovery
description: Error messages must include a clear recovery path (retry, edit, help link) (HIG, MD)

title: Multi Step Progress
description: Multi-step flows show step indicator or progress bar; allow back navigation (MD)

title: Form Autosave
description: Long forms should auto-save drafts to prevent data loss on accidental dismissal (Apple HIG)

title: Sheet Dismiss Confirm
description: Confirm before dismissing a sheet/modal with unsaved changes (Apple HIG)

title: Error Clarity
description: Error messages must state cause + how to fix (not just "Invalid input") (HIG, MD)

title: Field Grouping
description: Group related fields logically (fieldset/legend or visual grouping) (MD)

title: Read Only Distinction
description: Read-only state should be visually and semantically different from disabled (MD)

title: Focus Management
description: After submit error, auto-focus the first invalid field (WCAG, MD)

title: Error Summary
description: For multiple errors, show summary at top with anchor links to each field (WCAG)

title: Touch Friendly Input
description: Mobile input height ≥44px to meet touch target requirements (Apple HIG)

title: Destructive Emphasis
description: Destructive actions use semantic danger color (red) and are visually separated from primary actions (HIG, MD)

title: Toast Accessibility
description: Toasts must not steal focus; use aria-live="polite" for screen reader announcement (WCAG)

title: Aria Live Errors
description: Form errors use aria-live region or role="alert" to notify screen readers (WCAG)

title: Contrast Feedback
description: Error and success state colors must meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio (WCAG, MD)

title: Timeout Feedback
description: Request timeout must show clear feedback with retry option (MD)

title: Bottom Nav Limit
description: Bottom navigation max 5 items; use labels with icons (Material Design)

title: Drawer Usage
description: Use drawer/sidebar for secondary navigation, not primary actions (Material Design)

title: Back Behavior
description: Back navigation must be predictable and consistent; preserve scroll/state (Apple HIG, MD)

title: Deep Linking
description: All key screens must be reachable via deep link / URL for sharing and notifications (Apple HIG, MD)

title: Tab Bar Ios
description: iOS: use bottom Tab Bar for top-level navigation (Apple HIG)

title: Top App Bar Android
description: Android: use Top App Bar with navigation icon for primary structure (Material Design)

title: Nav Label Icon
description: Navigation items must have both icon and text label; icon-only nav harms discoverability (MD)

title: Nav State Active
description: Current location must be visually highlighted (color, weight, indicator) in navigation (HIG, MD)

title: Nav Hierarchy
description: Primary nav (tabs/bottom bar) vs secondary nav (drawer/settings) must be clearly separated (MD)

title: Modal Escape
description: Modals and sheets must offer a clear close/dismiss affordance; swipe-down to dismiss on mobile (Apple HIG)

title: Search Accessible
description: Search must be easily reachable (top bar or tab); provide recent/suggested queries (MD)

title: Breadcrumb Web
description: Web: use breadcrumbs for 3+ level deep hierarchies to aid orientation (MD)

title: State Preservation
description: Navigating back must restore previous scroll position, filter state, and input (HIG, MD)

title: Gesture Nav Support
description: Support system gesture navigation (iOS swipe-back, Android predictive back) without conflict (HIG, MD)

title: Tab Badge
description: Use badges on nav items sparingly to indicate unread/pending; clear after user visits (HIG, MD)

title: Overflow Menu
description: When actions exceed available space, use overflow/more menu instead of cramming (MD)

title: Bottom Nav Top Level
description: Bottom nav is for top-level screens only; never nest sub-navigation inside it (MD)

title: Adaptive Navigation
description: Large screens (≥1024px) prefer sidebar; small screens use bottom/top nav (Material Adaptive)

title: Back Stack Integrity
description: Never silently reset the navigation stack or unexpectedly jump to home (HIG, MD)

title: Navigation Consistency
description: Navigation placement must stay the same across all pages; don't change by page type

title: Avoid Mixed Patterns
description: Don't mix Tab + Sidebar + Bottom Nav at the same hierarchy level

title: Modal Vs Navigation
description: Modals must not be used for primary navigation flows; they break the user's path (HIG)

title: Focus On Route Change
description: After page transition, move focus to main content region for screen reader users (WCAG)

title: Persistent Nav
description: Core navigation must remain reachable from deep pages; don't hide it entirely in sub-flows (HIG, MD)

title: Destructive Nav Separation
description: Dangerous actions (delete account, logout) must be visually and spatially separated from normal nav items (HIG, MD)

title: Empty Nav State
description: When a nav destination is unavailable, explain why instead of silently hiding it (MD)

title: Chart Type
description: Match chart type to data type (trend → line, comparison → bar, proportion → pie/donut)

title: Color Guidance
description: Use accessible color palettes; avoid red/green only pairs for colorblind users (WCAG, MD)

title: Data Table
description: Provide table alternative for accessibility; charts alone are not screen-reader friendly (WCAG)

title: Pattern Texture
description: Supplement color with patterns, textures, or shapes so data is distinguishable without color (WCAG, MD)

title: Legend Visible
description: Always show legend; position near the chart, not detached below a scroll fold (MD)

title: Tooltip On Interact
description: Provide tooltips/data labels on hover (Web) or tap (mobile) showing exact values (HIG, MD)

title: Axis Labels
description: Label axes with units and readable scale; avoid truncated or rotated labels on mobile

title: Responsive Chart
description: Charts must reflow or simplify on small screens (e.g. horizontal bar instead of vertical, fewer ticks)

title: Empty Data State
description: Show meaningful empty state when no data exists ("No data yet" + guidance), not a blank chart (MD)

title: Loading Chart
description: Use skeleton or shimmer placeholder while chart data loads; don't show an empty axis frame

title: Animation Optional
description: Chart entrance animations must respect prefers-reduced-motion; data should be readable immediately (HIG)

title: Large Dataset
description: For 1000+ data points, aggregate or sample; provide drill-down for detail instead of rendering all (MD)

title: Number Formatting
description: Use locale-aware formatting for numbers, dates, currencies on axes and labels (HIG, MD)

title: Touch Target Chart
description: Interactive chart elements (points, segments) must have ≥44pt tap area or expand on touch (Apple HIG)

title: No Pie Overuse
description: Avoid pie/donut for >5 categories; switch to bar chart for clarity

title: Contrast Data
description: Data lines/bars vs background ≥3:1; data text labels ≥4.5:1 (WCAG)

title: Legend Interactive
description: Legends should be clickable to toggle series visibility (MD)

title: Direct Labeling
description: For small datasets, label values directly on the chart to reduce eye travel

title: Tooltip Keyboard
description: Tooltip content must be keyboard-reachable and not rely on hover alone (WCAG)

title: Sortable Table
description: Data tables must support sorting with aria-sort indicating current sort state (WCAG)

title: Axis Readability
description: Axis ticks must not be cramped; maintain readable spacing, auto-skip on small screens

title: Data Density
description: Limit information density per chart to avoid cognitive overload; split into multiple charts if needed

title: Trend Emphasis
description: Emphasize data trends over decoration; avoid heavy gradients/shadows that obscure the data

title: Gridline Subtle
description: Grid lines should be low-contrast (e.g. gray-200) so they don't compete with data

title: Focusable Elements
description: Interactive chart elements (points, bars, slices) must be keyboard-navigable (WCAG)

title: Screen Reader Summary
description: Provide a text summary or aria-label describing the chart's key insight for screen readers (WCAG)

title: Error State Chart
description: Data load failure must show error message with retry action, not a broken/empty chart

title: Export Option
description: For data-heavy products, offer CSV/image export of chart data

title: Drill Down Consistency
description: Drill-down interactions must maintain a clear back-path and hierarchy breadcrumb

title: Time Scale Clarity
description: Time series charts must clearly label time granularity (day/week/month) and allow switching
